creator: buganini@gmail.com
text:

WRKDIRPREFIX=/tmp/ports/
in my /etc/make.conf

and then:

Moving package file lists...
Cleaning up lists of files...
Fixing permissions...
Checking for DESTDIR inside installed files...
Packaging succeeded
touch: /tmp/ports//usr/ports/editors/libreoffice/work/loinstall//usr/local/lib/libreoffice/share/uno_packages/cache/.keep: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice.

Fix: 

Unknown, I just remove WRKDIRPREFIX temporarily.
and by the way MAKE_JOB_SAFE is unsafe on my anoter (amd64) computer.
How-To-Repeat: mkdir /tmp/ports/
echo WRKDIRPREFIX=/tmp/ports/ >> /etc/make.conf
cd /usr/ports/editors/libreoffice
make install
